# Vendored RealSense Description

This directory vendors only `realsense2_description` from IntelRealSense
`realsense-ros` for the D405 URDF and mesh used by the sketch robot EOAT.

- Source repository: https://github.com/IntelRealSense/realsense-ros
- Branch: `r/4.58.2`
- Commit: `5aad38a`
- Sparse path: `realsense2_description`

The runtime uses the D405 Xacro and STL from this package without building the
RealSense camera driver.
